ABOUT

A storyteller who edits with intent.

Creative Video Editor and Motion Graphics Designer with 2+ years of experience creating engaging content for brands and digital platforms. Skilled in high-end video editing, visual storytelling, dynamic motion graphics, professional color grading, and AI-powered creative workflows.

To craft compelling visual narratives that elevate brands, blending cinematic storytelling with cutting-edge motion design and AI-driven workflows.

EXPERIENCE

Where I've crafted.

MAY 2025 — PRESENT

The Vivid View

Marketing Agency

Hyderabad, India
VIDEO EDITOR & MOTION GRAPHICS DESIGNER

Leading the visual production pipeline — from commercial ad concepts to motion-driven brand campaigns.

Direct and edit commercial advertisements for digital marketing clients
Design motion graphics, kinetic typography, and brand identity reels
Build social media campaign assets across Reels, Shorts, and TVCs
Collaborate with strategists and designers on full-funnel creative
Shipped 40+ commercial ad cuts across 12 brands
Established a reusable motion-graphics template system
DECEMBER 2024 — MAY 2025

BIG TV — Chota News

Broadcast Network

Hyderabad, India
VIDEO EDITOR

Edited promotional reels, broadcast packages, and digital media for one of South India's leading news networks.

Edited promotional videos and television content for broadcast
Cut digital-first short formats for social platforms
Managed tight daily deadlines under live broadcast schedules
Delivered daily packages with zero on-air delivery delays
Designed visual lower-third templates adopted across the network
MAR 2024 — NOV 2024

Grid Marketing Agency

Performance Marketing

Hyderabad, India
MARKETING CREATIVES & PROMOTIONAL VIDEO EDITOR

Started as an intern, promoted to full-time creative — produced high-converting ad creatives and promotional videos.

Designed marketing creatives for multiple brands across categories
Edited promotional videos, advertisements, and social media content
A/B tested creative variations for performance campaigns
Promoted from intern to full-time within 3 months
Contributed to ad campaigns reaching 2M+ impressions
SERVICES

What I deliver.

Commercial Video Editing

High-impact video editing tailored for commercial ads, brand launches, and performance marketing campaigns.

  • Multi-cam editing
  • Dynamic pacing
  • Sound design & mixing
  • Platform optimization

Motion Graphics & VFX

Custom animations, kinetic typography, dynamic lower-thirds, and visual effects built in After Effects.

  • Logo animations
  • 2D/3D motion assets
  • Kinetic typography
  • Explainer graphics

Cinematic Color Grading

Professional color transformation in DaVinci Resolve to establish atmospheric moods and brand color fidelity.

  • LUT development
  • Skin tone correction
  • Shot matching
  • HDR workflows

AI-Powered Creative Workflows

Leveraging generative AI tools to accelerate video production, visual asset creation, and voice synthesis.

  • AI voiceover integration
  • Automated captioning
  • Generative visual effects
  • Smart workflow scaling

Social Media Reels & Shorts

Attention-grabbing short-form video content engineered for viral reach on Instagram, YouTube Shorts, and TikTok.

  • Hook-focused edits
  • Custom sound effects
  • Trendy transitions
  • Vertical framing

Brand Campaign Creatives

Comprehensive visual marketing assets and promo videos designed to elevate brand identity and drive conversions.

  • Ad variations
  • A/B creative testing
  • Brand storytelling
  • High-ROI visuals
